articles.title: TIKTOK INTRODUCES VOICE NOTES AND PHOTO SHARING IN DMS
articles.summary: TikTok is expanding its messaging features to let users send voice notes up to 60 seconds and share up to nine images or videos in one-on-one or group chats. The update includes editing options, safety restrictions for new contacts, and protections for younger users. The move will align TikTok more closely with platforms like WhatsApp and Instagram.

articles.title: PROFESSIONAL WEBSITE DESIGN PLATFORM FRAMER RAISES $100M AT $2B VALUATION
articles.summary: Amsterdam-based Framer has raised $100 million in Series D funding at a $2 billion valuation led by existing investors Meritech and Atomico. The professional website design platform empowers designers, developers, and marketers to create production-ready websites with AI assistance, databases, and advanced features, eliminating the need for technical expertise. Framer has focused on enterprise customers since launching its business plans last year, with hundreds of thousands of active websites and clients, including Scale AI, Perplexity, and Miro.

articles.title: MINDJOURNEY ENABLES AI TO EXPLORE SIMULATED 3D WORLDS TO IMPROVE SPATIAL INTERPRETATION
articles.summary: MindJourney is a novel research framework that enables AI agents to explore simulated 3D environments, thereby enhancing their understanding of spatial relationships derived from 2D images. The system utilizes a world model to generate photo-realistic views from various perspectives, while a vision-language model filters the most informative viewpoints using spatial beam search. Testing on the Spatial Aptitude Training benchmark showed MindJourney improved VLM accuracy by 8% without requiring additional training.

articles.title: WHERE AI IS FAILING DESIGN SYSTEMS, AND WHERE WE ARE FAILING AI
articles.summary: A discussion with 95 design system practitioners explored how AI fits into design systems, showing that AI is effective for divergent tasks like brainstorming, research, and low-risk prototyping, but struggles with convergent tasks that require precision, such as production-quality code, design-system fidelity, and pixel-perfect visuals. Successful integration depends on context engineering, rigorous contract tests, and careful measurement of AI output, treating AI as a collaborator to accelerate and propose rather than a fully reliable producer, while keeping human judgment central.

articles.title: AI-POWERED PROTOTYPING WITH DESIGN SYSTEMS
articles.summary: AI prototyping tools typically excel at speed and collaboration but struggle with brand consistency due to a lack of context about design systems. Vercel's v0 can generate brand-aligned, production-ready prototypes when paired with AI-native design systems like shadcn/ui, which provides open components, consistent APIs, and token-based styling that models can effectively interpret. Teams can create scalable AI prototyping workflows by applying design tokens to shadcn/ui themes, building reusable component blocks, and publishing registries that enable both humans and AI models to work with the same design system foundation.

articles.title: CREATIVE JOB LOSSES ARE RISING – AND WE NEED TO TALK ABOUT IT
articles.summary: The creative industries are experiencing unprecedented job losses as artificial intelligence displaces human workers, with WPP cutting 7,000 positions and tech companies eliminating over 22,000 jobs in 2025. While tech companies promote AI as "democratizing creativity," the reality creates homogenized, mediocre content that lacks the unpredictable human spark that resonates with audiences.

articles.title: BUILD ACCESSIBILITY INTO YOUR DESIGN WORKFLOW, NOT YOUR BACKLOG
articles.summary: Adhere to WCAG by building an accessible component library, auto-detecting issues for web and mobile interfaces, and streamlining dev handoff.

articles.title: MEET THE NEXT GENERATION OF INFOGRAPHICS
articles.summary: Transform complex ideas into captivating visuals that inform and engage your audience. With Piktochart AI, you can create stunning infographics, reports, and presentations in seconds, perfectly aligned with your brand.

articles.title: GEN LIKE A PRO. EDIT CONSISTENTLY
articles.summary: Kira is a chat-based AI image tool that lets you describe an idea, get an image, and then edit just by talking. No prompts, no layers.

articles.title: CURIOSITY ISN'T JUST A PERSONALITY TRAIT. IT'S A DESIGNER'S BEST STRATEGIC TOOL
articles.summary: Design leaders identify curiosity as a strategic tool for breaking silos and building relationships, not just a personality trait. The "Benjamin Franklin Effect" illustrates how asking colleagues for expertise-based favors can create cognitive dissonance, thereby improving strained workplace relationships. Framing curious questions around business impact helps designers connect their work to outcomes and positions design as strategic rather than purely visual.

articles.title: DESIGNING FOR TV: THE EVERGREEN PATTERN THAT SHAPES TV EXPERIENCES
articles.summary: TV interface design is governed by the "10-foot experience," requiring larger elements for distant viewing and the enduring D-pad navigation pattern from 1980s Nintendo controllers. Despite technological advances like touchpads and motion controls, the basic six-button scheme (four directions plus two action buttons) remains the universal foundation for TV interaction. This pattern persists because it represents the optimal balance between simplicity and functionality for remote-controlled navigation across all TV platforms.

articles.title: THE NEGATIVE SPACE IN THIS HORROR MOVIE POSTER IS PURE PERFECTION
articles.summary: The new poster for The Conjuring: Last Rites uses clever negative space to create a demon shape from a border of screaming faces, combining red and black for a classic horror aesthetic.

articles.title: FIVE TYPOGRAPHY BOOKS FOR A FALL DESIGN RESET
articles.summary: These five essential typography books, ranging from Ellen Lupton's comprehensive "Thinking with Type" to Josef Müller-Brockmann's grid-focused Swiss design classic, offer designers a foundation for fall practice renewal.
